experience.title: Operations Associate
bullets: Canadian work experience in a customer-facing environment, strengthening communication, adaptability, and collaboration skills in an English-speaking workplace.

experience.title: Product Owner – HR Systems & Process Initiatives
bullets: Supported HR process design and service improvement initiatives across a 6,500+ employee enterprise environment, collaborating with HR and technology stakeholders.
Developed and validated business requirements for HR-related workflows and service management solutions.
Supported SAP SuccessFactors reporting and HR data validation activities, contributing to reporting requirements, workforce data accuracy, and data quality initiatives.
Collaborated on API-based integrations that improved access to organizational and HR-related data for reporting and operational decision-making.
Performed UAT testing, defect validation, and requirements verification for HR and service management system enhancements.
Validated employee-related data, business rules, and workflow configurations to ensure system accuracy and process consistency.
Produced documentation, process flows, and operational procedures supporting business adoption and system consistency.
Coordinated with HR stakeholders, business teams, and technical teams to ensure successful implementation of process and technology improvements.

experience.title: Application Support Specialist
bullets: Provided application support and end-user issue resolution across Linux-based and SQL platforms for telecom clients.
Performed system troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and data validation activities, reducing recurring issues by 25%.
Maintained technical documentation, knowledge base articles, and SOPs to support team efficiency and onboarding.
Executed SQL queries for diagnostics, data validation, and system performance verification.

experience.title: Business Systems / Process Analyst
bullets: Supported requirements gathering, process documentation, and stakeholder alignment for large-scale core banking system implementations.
Performed data validation and system integration testing using SQL and Postman, ensuring accuracy and compliance prior to go-live.
Collaborated with technical and business teams to coordinate implementation activities, validate business rules, and verify system behavior.
Improved reporting delivery time by 35% through process optimization and scripting using PowerShell.

experience.title: QA Analyst / System Validator
bullets: Designed and executed functional testing, regression testing, and data validation across telecom systems and service deployments.
Provided UAT support, defect management, requirements verification, and business process validation throughout the testing lifecycle.
Maintained structured test documentation, validation protocols, and defect tracking records.
Reduced production defects by 15% and improved data reporting accuracy by 20% through rigorous validation processes.

name: Francisco Aleuy
title: QA & Systems Validation Specialist
summary: QA and Systems Validation professional with 10+ years across functional, regression, and integration testing in telecom, banking, and enterprise systems.
Hands-on with UAT support, defect management, requirements verification, SQL-based data validation, and test documentation, partnering with developers and business teams.
Focused on improving software quality and data reliability through rigorous, well-documented validation processes.
